rationale: The cited paper appears as a single methodological reference in the endogeneity discussion, where the authors note that self-selection implies nonindependent error terms and nonzero expected errors. The core estimation strategy is attributed to Heckman and especially Garen, which are the methods actually implemented and discussed in detail. There is no evidence that the citing paper builds on, extends, or critiques Franses (2005) beyond this brief support citation.
